basics.name: Vatsal Trivedi
basics.label: Forward Deployed Engineer · AI Platforms · Enterprise Integrations
basics.summary: I embed with the problem, ship into production, and own the integrations that make AI systems actually useful inside real enterprises. My work spans LLM orchestration, multi-tenant SaaS architecture, compliance-aware pipelines, and deep enterprise integrations; the kind of engineering where production uptime, audit trails, and regulated workflows are the bar. Strong full-stack delivery across the entire lifecycle, with a forward deployed mindset that prioritizes working software over polished demos.

work.name: Phamax
work.description: Ariya - AI platform for pharma that streamlines content generation, information research, analytics, and engagement.
work.summary: Leading engineering for Ariya, an AI-powered platform transforming pharmaceutical content workflows, research, analytics, and engagement. Driving the design and delivery of scalable, compliant, and intelligent systems integrating generative AI with enterprise ecosystems.
highlights: Architecting core systems for an AI platform serving global pharmaceutical clients, enabling end-to-end content workflows across content creation, research, analytics, and engagement.
Built the AI Content Wizard and content lifecycle management system covering authoring, multi-stage approval workflows, compliance validation, and omnichannel distribution across regulated markets.

Designed and deployed LLM orchestration frameworks covering prompt engineering, context injection, RAG pipelines, embedding retrieval, and tool calling — enabling compliant, traceable content generation across multiple content types and markets.
Integrated with enterprise ecosystems including Veeva CRM and Salesforce Marketing Cloud (SFMC) to support compliant omnichannel workflows across multiple client tenants.
Led development of a centralized Data Catalog enabling metadata-driven discovery, observability, and self-serve data access across business and engineering teams.
Implemented production-grade architecture with full auditability, deployment pipelines, monitoring, and optimized AI/data workflows using caching and vector databases.

work.name: Comviva
work.description: MobiLytix Rewards & MobiLytix Digital Marketing Product
work.summary: MobiLytix Rewards is a next-generation engagement marketing solution designed to power loyalty programs and promotional campaigns across industries.
highlights: Led the modernization of MobiLytix Rewards into a cloud-agnostic, multi-tenant SaaS product with AI/ML-driven personalization, serving enterprise clients across telecom and retail.
Drove full-stack architecture and feature development using TypeScript, React, FeathersJS, Delta Lake, Postgres, and vector databases across a distributed microservices system.
Owned event-driven campaign execution pipeline using Kafka, handling high-throughput reward and loyalty workflows at scale with asynchronous processing and caching.
Introduced observability and monitoring standards across the platform — improving deployment reliability and reducing mean time to resolution for production incidents.
Delivered major improvements in user engagement and campaign performance through data-driven personalization and ML-driven segmentation.

work.name: Comviva
work.summary: Contributed to the development of an omni-channel marketing automation platform designed to help enterprises engage customers across digital touchpoints.
highlights: Delivered 14+ integrations including Shopify Public App, Seatgeek, HubSpot, AWS QuickSight, GoodData, Matomo, WooCommerce, WordPress, Batch Push, and Unlayer Editor.
Implemented ML-driven insights using Google BigQuery and GoodData for personalized campaign optimization.
Enhanced performance through query optimization, caching, and CDN strategies.
Resolved deep integration challenges around multi-tenant data isolation, API rate limiting, and secure credential handling across third-party platforms.

work.name: Tata Consultancy Services (TCS)
work.description: Worked in the Lifesciences domain, delivering digital transformation solutions for global clients.
work.summary: Delivered digital transformation solutions for global life sciences clients, building full-stack applications and data-driven tools in a regulated enterprise environment.
highlights: Developed and delivered full-stack applications using ReactJS, Angular, NodeJS, and ExpressJS.
Enabled business collaboration using Microsoft 365 suite including SharePoint, Teams, Power Automate, and Power BI.
Built analytics and reporting workflows using GA360, Google Tag Manager, and Data Studio for enterprise life sciences teams.

volunteer.summary: Lead the design team for the GDG Ahmedabad chapter, creating event visuals, branding assets, and social media graphics for community events.
Mentored open-source contributors during the GirlScript Summer of Code 2020 program, guiding them in project architecture, code reviews, and development best practices.

education.institution: Birla Vishvakarma Mahavidyalaya Engineering College, Vallabh Vidyanagar

certificates.name: Data Science on Google Cloud Platform: Designing Data Warehouses

projects.name: InboxCraft
projects.description: Client-side tool that generates PowerShell scripts to automate Microsoft 365 Outlook inbox rules - no sign-up, no backend, fully transparent script execution.
highlights: Built Quick Mode and Advanced Mode workflows for inbox rule generation with a pre-built template library for services like GitHub, Slack, and Jira.
AST-based PowerShell code generation with syntax highlighting; entirely client-side for security and transparency.
Published as an official Agent Skills package — compatible with Claude Code, Cursor, and AI assistants following the Vercel Labs skills spec; available via npx skills.

projects.name: InboxCraft Skills
projects.description: Official agent skill pack for InboxCraft - nine PowerShell-based tools enabling AI assistants to manage Outlook rules, folders, and categories via natural language.
highlights: Compatible with Claude Code, Cursor, Antigravity, and any assistant following the npx skills specification.
Covers rule creation, folder hierarchy visualization, category management, large folder detection, and empty folder cleanup.

projects.name: StaleGuard
projects.description: Zero-friction stale deployment detector - silently reloads outdated SPA builds on tab focus by monitoring HTTP ETag/Last-Modified headers, with no polling or user banners.
highlights: Focus-triggered version checking with ETag and Last-Modified fallback; offline-safe.
Deployed to Azure Static Web Apps and GitHub Pages with automated GitHub Actions workflow.

projects.name: PySecRecipes
projects.description: Production-ready GitHub Actions workflow for automated Python dependency security audits - weekly scans, vulnerability reporting, and intelligent issue lifecycle management.
highlights: Scans against PyPI Advisory, OSV, and Python Packaging Advisory databases; generates detailed remediation reports.
Auto-creates and closes GitHub issues as vulnerabilities appear and are resolved; supports monorepos and multi-environment setups.

projects.name: PyImportSync
projects.description: AST-based Python dependency validator that ensures all imports in a codebase are declared in requirements.txt - available as a GitHub Action and pre-commit hook with a published v1.0.0 release.
highlights: Git-aware caching and configurable analysis paths for fast execution in CI/CD pipelines.
Cross-platform support via shell and PowerShell scripts; integrates with UV package manager.
